required_preferences.fact: Travels to out-of-town tournaments to watch his son's travel soccer games most weekends; rarely attends local matches anymore

supersedes.fact: Attends his son's soccer matches every weekend — leaves early only if there's a true emergency

required_preferences.fact: Follows a prescribed intensive physical therapy routine daily, guided by his therapist; only minimal stretching allowed outside sessions

supersedes.fact: Lies on the floor for daily stretching exercises after getting home — avoids conventional gym workouts

required_preferences.fact: Researches and implements accessible home modifications, such as bathroom handrails and wider pathways, to accommodate his father's mobility needs
Joins local or online caregiver support communities to seek advice and emotional support about elder care responsibilities
Pays bills on the first Sunday of each month — never lets payments fall behind
Plays strategy board games with friends — avoids party or trivia games

persona: A senior accountant at a nonprofit organization with limited staff
